_note: estimated — run `go test -bench=. -benchmem -benchtime=3s ./...` for real numbers on your hardware

results.description: Ring lookup throughput (100 vNodes, 5 physical nodes)
Ring lookup throughput (1000 vNodes, 5 physical nodes)
results.note: slower due to larger sorted slice in binary search

results.description: Add a node to a 5-node ring (100 vNodes each — inserts 100 positions + re-sort)
Key remapping rate when adding 6th node to 5-node ring (100 vNodes)
results.note: matches theoretical minimum — only the new node's predecessor range moves

results.description: Distribution coefficient of variation with 1 vNode per physical node (5 nodes, 10k keys)
results.note: pure accident of MD5 positions — one node can receive 31% while another gets 9%

results.description: Distribution coefficient of variation with 100 vNodes per physical node
results.note: 1/sqrt(100) ≈ 10% improvement factor from 28% → ~4% confirms the 1/sqrt(N) bound

results.description: Distribution coefficient of variation with 1000 vNodes per physical node
results.note: diminishing returns — 10× more vNodes gives only ~3× less std dev, as 1/sqrt predicts
